panels.title: Current streak (days ≥ goal)
panels.description: Consecutive civil days (in $timezone) ending yesterday with steps ≥ $steps_goal. Today is excluded while still in progress.

panels.title: Today so far
panels.description: In-progress civil day (in $timezone); not counted toward the streak until it's complete.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(steps, 0) AS "today's steps" FROM health.steps_daily WHERE day = (now() AT TIME ZONE '$timezone')::date

panels.title: This week vs 30d baseline
panels.description: Trailing 7 civil days' average steps vs. the 30-day median (health.daily_baseline).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT avg(value) - avg(median) AS "steps vs baseline (7d avg)"
FROM health.daily_baseline
WHERE metric = 'steps' AND day > (now() AT TIME ZONE '$timezone')::date - 7 AND day <= (now() AT TIME ZONE '$timezone')::date

SELECT 'Best step day' AS metric, max(steps)::text AS value FROM health.steps_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(day::timestamp)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Best sleep score', max(sc.overall)::text FROM health.sleep_score sc JOIN health.sleep_session ss ON ss.log_id = sc.sleep_log_id WHERE ss.main_sleep AND $__timeFilter(ss.day::timestamp)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Lowest resting HR', min(bpm)::text FROM health.resting_heart_rate WHERE $__timeFilter(day::timestamp)

panels.title: Daily steps vs goal (last 30 days)
panels.description: One block per civil day (in $timezone): green ≥ goal, yellow ≥ half goal, red below.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT (day::timestamp AT TIME ZONE '$timezone') AS "time",
  CASE WHEN steps >= $steps_goal THEN 2 WHEN steps >= $steps_goal / 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS status
FROM health.steps_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(day::timestamp) ORDER BY day

SELECT (day::timestamp AT TIME ZONE '$timezone') AS "time", value - median AS "steps vs 30d median"
FROM health.daily_baseline WHERE metric = 'steps' AND $__timeFilter(day::timestamp) ORDER BY day

panels.title: Active Zone Minutes — trailing 7 days (WHO 150 min/week guideline)
panels.description: AZM already applies Fitbit's own WHO-aligned weighting (Fat Burn ×1, Cardio/Peak ×2).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT sum(minutes) FILTER (WHERE zone IN ('CARDIO', 'PEAK')) * 2
     + sum(minutes) FILTER (WHERE zone = 'FAT_BURN') AS "AZM (7d, WHO-weighted)"
FROM health.azm_hourly
WHERE hour >= (now() AT TIME ZONE '$timezone')::date - 6 AND hour < (now() AT TIME ZONE '$timezone')::date + 1
